questions.question: Describe the main advantages of the chalk and talk method over the PowerPoint presentation method in teaching-learning process, particularly in a metric spaces topic.
questions.hint: Clearly explain the benefits of chalk and talk method

questions.question: A student is having difficulty understanding the concept of a metric space. What type of teaching-learning strategy would you adopt to help the student, considering the chalk and talk method and PowerPoint presentation method?
questions.hint: Choose a suitable method to clarify the concept

questions.question: Compare the effectiveness of the chalk and talk method and PowerPoint presentation method in engaging students in a metric spaces topic. Provide reasons to support your answer.
questions.hint: Clearly discuss the strengths and weaknesses of both methods
